def_en: Anthropic's toolkit for building agentic apps: the agent loop, subagents, tool integration, and lifecycle hooks.
def_zh: Anthropic 用於建構代理式應用的工具組:代理迴圈、子代理、工具整合與生命週期 Hooks。

def_en: The cycle of model call → tool execution → feeding results back, repeating until the model returns end_turn.
def_zh: 「模型呼叫 → 執行工具 → 回傳結果」的循環,反覆進行直到模型回傳 end_turn。

def_en: A separate agent the coordinator delegates a sub-task to, with its own isolated context.
def_zh: 協調者委派子任務的獨立代理,擁有自己隔離的上下文。

def_en: The lead agent that splits work into sub-tasks, delegates them to specialized subagents, then synthesizes the results.
def_zh: 負責拆解工作、委派給專門子代理,再綜整結果的主導代理。

def_en: A lifecycle callback that runs before or after a tool call to inspect, modify, or filter it.
def_zh: 在工具呼叫前或後執行的生命週期回呼,可檢視、修改或過濾該呼叫。

def_en: The list restricting which tools an agent may call; a coordinator must include 'Task' to spawn subagents.
def_zh: 限制代理可呼叫哪些工具的清單;協調者必須包含 'Task' 才能產生子代理。

def_en: The built-in tool an agent uses to spawn a subagent for an independent unit of work.
def_zh: 代理用來為獨立工作單元產生子代理的內建工具。

def_en: The response field saying why generation stopped: end_turn, tool_use, max_tokens, stop_sequence, pause_turn, or refusal.
def_zh: 回應中說明為何停止生成的欄位:end_turn、tool_use、max_tokens、stop_sequence、pause_turn 或 refusal。

def_en: The response block where the model requests a tool call with structured JSON input.
def_zh: 模型以結構化 JSON 輸入請求呼叫工具的回應區塊。

def_en: The request setting controlling tool use: auto, any, a forced specific tool, or none.
def_zh: 控制工具使用方式的請求設定:auto、any、強制特定工具,或 none。

def_en: Issuing multiple independent tool calls in one turn; all results are returned together in a single user message.
def_zh: 在同一回合發出多個獨立工具呼叫;所有結果一併放入單一使用者訊息回傳。

def_en: The separate instruction field that sets the model's role, constraints, and output format for the whole conversation.
def_zh: 另外設定的指令欄位,為整段對話定義模型的角色、限制與輸出格式。

def_en: The total tokens the model processes at once: system prompt + full history + tool definitions + tool results.
def_zh: 模型一次能處理的 token 總量:系統提示 + 完整歷史 + 工具定義 + 工具結果。

def_en: The tendency to attend reliably to the start and end of a long input but miss details in the middle.
def_zh: 模型對長輸入的開頭與結尾較可靠,卻容易忽略中段細節的傾向。

def_en: Compressing earlier history to save context; risks losing exact numbers, percentages, and dates.
def_zh: 壓縮較早的歷史以節省上下文;有遺失精確數字、百分比與日期的風險。

def_en: An external file the agent writes intermediate findings to, keeping the context window lean.
def_zh: 代理把中間發現寫入的外部檔案,讓上下文視窗保持精簡。

def_en: Reusing a stable prompt prefix across requests to cut cost and latency; any byte change in the prefix invalidates it.
def_zh: 跨請求重用穩定的提示前綴以降低成本與延遲;前綴只要有一個位元組改變就會失效。

def_en: An open standard for connecting models to external tools, resources, and data via MCP servers.
def_zh: 透過 MCP 伺服器將模型連接到外部工具、資源與資料的開放標準。

def_en: A backend exposing tools and resources to the model over MCP; it handles authentication outside the prompt.
def_zh: 以 MCP 將工具與資源提供給模型的後端;在提示之外處理驗證。

zh: MCP 工具 vs 資源
def_en: Tools are actions the model can invoke; resources are data the model can read.
def_zh: 工具是模型可叫用的動作;資源是模型可讀取的資料。

def_en: The flag marking a tool result as an error so the model can recover rather than treat it as success.
def_zh: 將工具結果標示為錯誤的旗標,讓模型得以復原而非當成成功。

zh: 結構化錯誤(類別+可重試)
def_en: Returning tool errors with a category and a retryable flag so the model retries transient failures and escalates permanent ones.
def_zh: 回傳帶有類別與可重試旗標的工具錯誤,讓模型重試暫時性失敗、升級永久性失敗。

def_en: The project file declaring MCP servers for the team; user-level config lives in ~/.claude.json.
def_zh: 為團隊宣告 MCP 伺服器的專案檔;使用者層級設定放在 ~/.claude.json。

def_en: Claude Code's persistent project memory; conventions here load automatically every session (user → project → directory hierarchy).
def_zh: Claude Code 的持久專案記憶;此處的慣例每次工作階段自動載入(使用者 → 專案 → 目錄階層)。

def_en: Path-scoped rule files that load conditionally via a 'paths' glob, so rules apply only to matching files.
def_zh: 以 'paths' glob 條件式載入的路徑範圍化規則檔,規則只套用於符合的檔案。

def_en: A reusable, invokable workflow saved as a project or user command (unified with skills).
def_zh: 存成專案或使用者命令的可重複、可叫用工作流程(已與技能整合)。

def_en: A folder with a SKILL.md whose short description stays in context; the full instructions load on demand when relevant.
def_zh: 含 SKILL.md 的資料夾,其簡短描述常駐上下文;完整指令在相關時才按需載入。

def_en: A skill/subagent setting that runs work in an isolated context and returns only a summary, protecting the main context.
def_zh: 讓工作在隔離上下文中執行、只回傳摘要的技能/子代理設定,可保護主上下文。

def_en: A Claude Code mode that produces and confirms an approach before making any edits — best for large or ambiguous changes.
def_zh: Claude Code 在進行任何編輯前先產出並確認做法的模式 —— 最適合大型或模糊的變更。

def_en: A Claude Code command that condenses the conversation to free up context.
def_zh: Claude Code 用來壓縮對話以釋放上下文的命令。

def_en: Branching a session so a side task runs without polluting the main session's context.
def_zh: 分叉工作階段,讓支線任務在不污染主工作階段上下文的情況下執行。

def_en: Running Claude Code non-interactively for CI/scripts; pair with --output-format json for machine-readable output.
def_zh: 以非互動方式執行 Claude Code 供 CI/腳本使用;搭配 --output-format json 取得機器可讀輸出。

def_en: Claude Code's core file/shell tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob (plus Task for subagents).
def_zh: Claude Code 的核心檔案/shell 工具:Read、Write、Edit、Bash、Grep、Glob(加上用於子代理的 Task)。

zh: 用 Grep/Glob 而非 Bash 搜尋
def_en: Prefer Grep/Glob for code search — structured, parallel-safe results — over piping files through Bash.
def_zh: 搜尋程式碼優先用 Grep/Glob —— 結果結構化、可平行安全 —— 而非把檔案透過 Bash 倒出。

zh: JSON 結構描述(結構化輸出)
def_en: Defining the exact output shape so the model returns reliably parseable, well-typed data via tool_use.
def_zh: 定義精確的輸出形狀,讓模型透過 tool_use 回傳可靠可解析、型別良好的資料。

zh: strict 模式(嚴格工具使用)
def_en: Enforcing the schema at generation time so tool inputs conform exactly — no missing keys, no extras.
def_zh: 在生成時強制套用結構描述,使工具輸入完全相符 —— 不缺鍵、不多餘。

zh: 可為 null / 選填欄位
def_en: Schema design that lets the model represent 'not present' instead of fabricating a value.
def_zh: 讓模型能表示「不存在」而非捏造數值的結構描述設計。

def_en: Capturing known categories with an enum plus an 'other' value and a detail field for the long tail.
def_zh: 用 enum 擷取已知類別,再以 'other' 值與細節欄位處理長尾。

def_en: Giving the model a few targeted examples to steer behavior on ambiguous cases.
def_zh: 給模型少量針對性範例,以在模糊情況下引導其行為。

def_en: Decomposing a task into sequential focused passes, each handling one step.
def_zh: 把任務拆成連續、聚焦的多個步驟,每步處理一件事。

def_en: Catching schema-valid-but-wrong output with semantic validation (e.g. Pydantic) and feeding failures back for correction.
def_zh: 用語意驗證(如 Pydantic)抓出「符合結構描述卻錯誤」的輸出,並把失敗回饋以供修正。

def_en: Asynchronous bulk processing at ~50% cost for large, non-latency-sensitive jobs (results within ~24h).
def_zh: 為大量、非延遲敏感的工作提供約 5 折成本的非同步批次處理(約 24 小時內完成)。

def_en: The per-request identifier used to match batch results, which arrive in any order.
def_zh: 用來對應批次結果(結果順序不定)的每筆請求識別碼。

def_en: Handing off to a person on a policy gap, explicit request, or repeated inability to progress — with the gathered context.
def_zh: 在政策缺口、明確要求,或反覆無法推進時,帶著已蒐集的脈絡交給人處理。

def_en: Scoring per-field confidence and calibrating it on a labeled, stratified sample to set auto-accept vs review thresholds.
def_zh: 對各欄位評分信心,並以已標註、分層的樣本校準,以設定自動接受 vs 人工審查的門檻。

def_en: Tracking claim→source mappings so outputs are verifiable and conflicts are annotated, not silently resolved.
def_zh: 追蹤「主張→來源」對應,使輸出可驗證、衝突被註記而非默默處理。

def_en: Letting the model decide when and how much to reason (thinking: adaptive), tuned via the effort parameter — replaces fixed budget_tokens.
def_zh: 讓模型自行決定何時、思考多少(thinking: adaptive),以 effort 參數調整 —— 取代固定的 budget_tokens。

def_en: Designing destructive tools so repeats don't double-apply, and gating them behind confirmation/permissions.
def_zh: 設計破壞性工具使重複執行不會重複套用,並以確認/權限把關。

def_en: Promote an action to a dedicated, typed tool when the harness must gate, validate, render, or audit it; use bash for breadth.
def_zh: 當框架需要把關、驗證、渲染或稽核某動作時,將其提升為專用、具型別的工具;廣度需求才用 bash。
